name: casa-plugins-defaults
_notes: Dev-tooling marketplace for the plugin-developer executor. All entries are official-sourced and frozen (no floating ref). plugin-dev/skill-creator/mcp-server-dev → anthropics/claude-plugins-official subdirs (plugins/<name>), pinned to a commit sha. superpowers → obra/superpowers (Anthropic-blessed; the official marketplace forwards here), pinned to a release tag. Re-sourced + re-pinned 2026-06-05 (v0.46.3): superpowers v5.0.7→v5.1.0; claude-plugins-official subdirs 020446a→bd7cf41. document-skills was removed in v0.46.3 — it is xlsx/docx/pptx/pdf document-PROCESSING (not plugin-dev tooling) and was mis-bundled; mcp-builder/doc-coauthoring/theme-factory live in anthropics/skills' example-skills pack, not document-skills.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Superpowers meta-skill pack (brainstorming, writing-plans, subagent-driven-development, executing-plans, requesting-code-review, ...).

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin authoring doctrine (plugin-structure, plugin-settings, agent-development, command-development, hook-development, mcp-integration, skill-development).

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: SKILL.md authoring craft — create new skills, edit existing skills, measure skill performance.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: MCP server development — build-mcp-server, build-mcpb, build-mcp-app.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server (npx @upstash/context7-mcp) — current, version-accurate library/SDK docs. Keyless works (rate-limited); optional CONTEXT7_API_KEY (set via plugin-env.conf — see configurator recipes/plugin/secrets.md) raises limits.
